title: tillandsia aurea var. minor
intro: Tillandsia aurea var. minor, also known as the Golden Air Plant or lesser gold air plant, is a type of epiphytic plant in the Tillandsia genus, characterized by its bright yellow leaves and ability to thrive in environments with limited water and nutrient availability. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tillandsia aurea var. minor include the potential treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
